mapper.select: select id, code, name, status, data_scope, version from sys_role where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role (id, code, name, status, data_scope, version) values (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{dataScope}, #{version})
mapper.update: update sys_role set status = #{status}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into sys_role_menu (role_id, menu_id) values (#{roleId}, #{menuId})
mapper.select: select menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into sys_role_dept (role_id, dept_id) values (#{roleId}, #{deptId})
mapper.select: select user_id from sys_user_role where role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into sys_user_role (user_id, role_id) values (#{userId}, #{roleId})
mapper.delete: delete from sys_user_role where user_id = #{userId} and role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_role where role_id = #{roleId}
